name: 1 Skillet Festive Chicken
recipeInstructions:
1. Rinse chicken well.
2. In a bag, combine flour, salt and chili powder. Shake chicken pieces in the flour mixture to coat evenly.
3. In a large skillet, brown the chicken in oil over medium heat.
4. In a bowl, mix together diced tomatoes, diced green chiles, sliced black olives, onion, cilantro, garlic powder (1/8 teaspoon), and enough hot cooked rice to serve.
5. Pour the mixture over the chicken.
6. Cover and simmer on low heat for 40 minutes or until the chicken is fully cooked.
7. Serve the chicken with the sauce and hot cooked rice.
